name: naming-is-hard
description: Interactive naming assistant: profile your project, explore on-brief candidates while the model learns your taste, then validate against real availability (domains, GitHub, registries, social) and a trademark/business screen that flags Deal Breakers.

scripts.test: node test/net.test.mjs && node test/features.test.mjs && node test/similarity.test.mjs && node test/marks.test.mjs && node test/model.test.mjs && node test/verdict.test.mjs && node test/availability.test.mjs && node test/store.test.mjs && node test/cli.test.mjs
